subject: chemistry
title: 22M.1.HL.TZ2.11
question_html:
What is the formal charge of the oxygen atom in H3O+?

A.  −2

B.  −1

C.  0

D.  +1
examiners_html: 44% of candidates were able to determine the formal charge of the oxygen atom in H3O+. The most commonly chosen distractor was -2 (the oxidation state of the oxygen).
